title: brassica rapa var. ruvo
intro: Brassica rapa var. ruvo, also known as Broccolini, is a type of leafy green vegetable that belongs to the Brassica family, which includes broccoli, cauliflower, and kale. It is rich in medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and improve immune function, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of consuming Broccolini include reducing the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease, diabetes, and certain types of cancer, as well as supporting bone health and eye health. Broccolini can be prepared in various herbal forms, including steaming, sautéing, and infusing in teas, and is also used in capsule or tablet form in supplement form.
